user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add new FMLA approver(s), so that FMLA requests are routed to the correct people for approval.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the FMLA Approvers screen; When I click Add new FMLA approver(s) and select locations and approvers; Then the new FMLA approver mapping is saved and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view FMLA approvers by location and approver, so that I can verify approval routing per location.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the FMLA Approvers screen; When the list loads; Then I see the Location(s) and Approver(s) columns for each configured mapping

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to see a clear empty state when no FMLA approvers exist, so that I know configuration is required.
acceptance_criteria: Given there are no FMLA approvers configured; When the list loads; Then it shows "No records to display"

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to page through and navigate back from the FMLA Approvers list, so that I can manage many approver mappings.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the FMLA Approvers screen; When I use Next or Back; Then I navigate the approver list accordingly
